name: cicd-automation
description: Review and generate CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI). Checks security, SHA pinning, supply chain, permissions, caching, and compliance.

skills.name: cicd-review
skills.trigger: When the user asks to review, audit, or check a CI/CD pipeline, workflow file, or .github/workflows/ / .gitlab-ci.yml content.

skills.name: pipeline-generator
skills.trigger: When the user asks to create, generate, or scaffold a new CI/CD pipeline or workflow.

agents.name: cicd-agent
agents.description: Full-lifecycle CI/CD agent that can review existing pipelines, generate new ones, and fix issues.

hooks.name: workflow-lint
hooks.description: Lint workflow files before commit to catch common mistakes.
